counters.description: can all in you very easily and can get out of your combo really easily, poke him, play safe, don't try all in if he still has his combo
if it's ekko mid, you better dodge if you wanted to play the game
for top lane kennen, tahm is a very bad matchup with how strong he is rn
if cho'gath is good and hits his spells, good luck, you are not killing him outside of early game
i consider this a fairly even matchup, but you need make extremely short trades to avoid damage and most have trouble with this, so it becomes a skilled matchup most of the time
you win early game if you avoid his cheese, late game you have pretty much no change to kill him alone
he just heals a lot, you can keep the lane even but don't overcommit to a kill
